steps.title: Aadhaar Verification
steps.description: Enter Aadhaar and Entrepreneur Name to validate identity and generate OTP

validation.message: Aadhaar Number must be exactly 12 numeric digits.

fields.name: entrepreneurName
fields.label: Name of Entrepreneur / उद्यमी का नाम
fields.placeholder: Name exactly as printed on Aadhaar Card

validation.message: Entrepreneur Name must be between 3 and 100 characters.

fields.name: declarationConsent
fields.label: Declaration & Consent
fields.description: I, the holder of Aadhaar number, hereby give my consent to Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, Government of India for using my Aadhaar number and details for Udyam Registration and verification purposes.

validation.message: You must check the box to declare consent before proceeding.

actionButton.label: Validate & Generate OTP / सत्यापित करें और ओटीपी उत्पन्न करें

steps.title: OTP Verification
steps.description: An OTP has been sent to your mobile number registered with Aadhaar

fields.name: otp
fields.label: One Time Password (OTP) / वन टाइम पासवर्ड

validation.message: OTP must be exactly 6 numeric digits.

steps.title: PAN Verification
steps.description: Validate your Permanent Account Number (PAN) and select organization type

fields.name: panType
fields.label: Type of Organisation / संगठन का प्रकार

options.label: Hindu Undivided Family (HUF) / हिंदू अविभाजित परिवार
Private Limited Company / प्राइवेट लिमिटेड कंपनी
Public Limited Company / पब्लिक लिमिटेड कंपनी
Limited Liability Partnership (LLP) / सीमित देयता भागीदारी

validation.message: Please select the Type of Organisation.

fields.name: panNumber
fields.label: Permanent Account Number (PAN) / स्थायी खाता संख्या (पैन)

fields.name: pinCode
fields.label: Pin Code / पिन कोड (Bonus City/State Autofill)

validation.message: Pin Code must be exactly 6 numeric digits.

actionButton.label: Validate PAN & Submit / पैन सत्यापित करें और जमा करें
